description: The six runs in Table 1 of the paper (headline dev results). expected_dev_f1 is the macro-F1 reported in §4.1 Table 1; reproduction runs should land within seed noise of this value. Numbers verified against sections/04_results.tex lines 25-30.

runs.note: Run actually uploaded to TIRA as st1_base (raw_concat input, max_len 512); see scripts/generate_submissions.py:48,57.

runs.cv_note: Single-fold dev F1 is 0.735 (Table 1). 5-fold CV mean is 0.875 with the same recipe (fold seeds 42-46); see §4.1 line 35. The CV mean is the decision-relevant number behind the final-submission rationale.

post_run.description: ST3 per-class threshold sweep on exp_0073 dev probabilities (ee=0.1, ei=0.1, pe=0.05, pi=0.4). Adds +1.0pp aggregate F1 over default argmax; see §4.7 and §6.3.
